## What changed

Describe the implementation and its user-visible effect.

## Language impact

- [ ] No language-semantic changes
- [ ] Assembly semantics changed
- [ ] SVG/Piet profile changed
- [ ] MIDI/Velato profile changed
- [ ] MerzScript ABI changed

For semantic changes, update `SPEC.md` and add tests.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] New or changed behaviour has automated tests
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated

## Artwork evidence

Attach a screenshot, SVG, MIDI excerpt, or console output when the change affects visual or musical programs.
